changes.summary: Created Phase 2 application layer directory tree with use-cases/ stub; added ApplicationModule composition root importing DomainModule and spreading applicationUseCaseProviders from _bootstrap.ts.
Composition-root registry exporting applicationUseCaseProviders array for future phase-3+ use case class registration (empty scaffold with documented extension point).
Imported and registered ApplicationModule in composition root after DomainModule and before AdaptersModule (dep-inward: domain → application → adapters).

notes: applicationUseCaseProviders is intentionally empty; phase-3 work units (p3-get-remaining-quota-uc, p3-create-vote-uc, etc.) append injectable use case classes to _bootstrap.ts. AdaptersModule unchanged; future adapter wiring may import ApplicationModule when use cases are consumed from adapters/trpc.
